reasoning: Dan Osborn was reported to be exploring a midterm bid against Sen. Pete Ricketts on April 3, 2025. Candidates who float explorations in the spring frequently announce in May to maximize their first quarterly fundraising report (Q2 ending June 30). Crucially, Osborn's political brand is heavily tied to the labor movement, making May 1st (International Workers' Day) an extremely fitting and probable launch date for his campaign if he decides to run. While he may decide against running due to Ricketts' overwhelming personal wealth, or delay an announcement until the fall, the incentives for a May launch are strong, bringing the probability to 45%.
